post.subject: Thanks Donny
post.body: Yeah, i guess i should take the time to thankDonny Osmond. It is because of him that my mum is away for today and again on Friday to see him in concert! It means that I wont be yelled every 2 minutes for me to get off the computer, help her with something stupid on the computer or hear about the fact that Donny just took a shit! A night without Mum, YAY!!
